channel.title: bioinf on Even - A super concise theme for Hugo
channel.description: Recent content in bioinf on Even - A super concise theme for Hugo

item.title: bioinf常见的一些错误（转载）
item.description: This nice thread(https://www.biostars.org/p/7126/) summarized a lot of common mistakes people (including me, of course) might make in daily work. * forget to check both strands * generate random genomic sites without avoiding masked (NNN) gaps * confuse genome freezes and even species * a lot of off-by-one errors due to switching between formats: Bed is 0 based; GFF/GTF are 1-based * Trusting that a downloaded file is actually fully downloaded
